violations.text: The garage door to the outside, located in the receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2026
The drain for 3-bay sink in the grill area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Drain was observed to be leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

The restroom in the front of the store was lacking proper signage indicating that employees must wash hands before returning to work. Establishment to post proper signage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The door to the outside, leading to the shared hallway and the door located in the back receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2024

The concentration for the anti-microbial produce wash was observed outside of the manufacturer's recommended range. Establishment is to have service visit establishment and adjust dispenser to obtain a concentration within the recommended range. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024

Knives were observed stored between the wall and food preparation sink in the produce area in the back. Utensils between uses shall be stored in one of the following manners; on a dry clean surface, in hot water that is maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit, or in water with sufficient flow to flush any food residue away from utensils. Knives were removed from improper storage area and sent to 3-bay sink to be washed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door low boy freezer in the cafe area. Refrigerator door gaskets are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024
The floors in the cafe area and the back hallway are area in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen at the juicing station. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023
No hand washing sign was observed in the employee restroom at time inspection. Establishment shall put a Employee hand washing sign in employee restroom New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and holder) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was cleaned during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023
